description: The SOYUZSNAB Group of Companies offers a wide selection of cocoa powders from leading global manufacturers: TULIP Cocoa (Germany) and Golden Harvest Cocoa (Indonesia). Special attention was paid to the production facility's equipment when choosing a supplier, ensuring its ability to produce consistently high-quality products that meet the standards of the SOYUZSNAB Group. All cocoa powders are obtained by grinding low-fat cocoa cake, which is a result of pressing cocoa liquor made from Côte d'Ivoire beans. **Application areas include:** chocolate milk, desserts, curd products, condensed milk with cocoa, chocolate butter, spreads, and processed cheeses.
